epigraph.quote: John & Charles have enjoyed everything, & been no trouble.

moments.quote: We drove straight onto the ferry just after 4.30.
Eve ate fish & chips on the ferry & was sick in the night.
We camped in Fontaines des Cleres campsite **** at Montreuil, a pretty walled town 40 minutes from Boulogne.
We stopped at Abbeville, to buy William sandals.
We rode in a "train" round the old wooden streets
